summary: Persistence Phase 1 testing complete. All 22 backend pytest tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. MongoDB seed-if-empty working correctly for event_notes (5 seeded from Winter Showcase) and recommendations (5 seeded). CRUD operations (create, read, update) for event_notes and recommendations persist to MongoDB and remain consistent. Recommendation workflow (send, respond, follow-up, close) correctly transitions status and persists response_history to DB. Routing notes to Support Pod updates routed_to_pod flag in MongoDB. Integration endpoints (Mission Control, Program Intelligence, Relationships) correctly read from persisted data.
seed_data_creation: MongoDB collections seeded on first startup: event_notes (5 notes from Winter Showcase event_0), recommendations (5 recommendations in various states). Test data prefixed with TEST_ created during pytest runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persistence Phase 1 fully tested. Key architecture: on startup, seed_if_empty seeds event_notes and recommendations from mock data if collections empty, then loads from DB into memory. On writes, data persists to MongoDB AND updates in-memory. Engine modules (decision_engine, program_engine) read from in-memory which stays synced with DB. MongoDB collections: event_notes, recommendations. Startup logs show 'Persistence Phase 1: startup seed & load complete'. API endpoints tested: GET/POST/PATCH /api/events/{event_id}/notes, POST /api/events/{event_id}/notes/{note_id}/route, GET/POST/PATCH /api/advocacy/recommendations/{rec_id}, POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{rec_id}/(send|respond|follow-up|close).

seed_data: event_notes_seeded_for_event_0: 5+ seeded notes from Winter Showcase
seeded_recommendation_structure: rec_1 (Marcus Johnson → Michigan) has correct fields
event_note_crud: create_event_note: POST creates note in MongoDB, GET retrieves it
update_event_note_interest_level: PATCH updates interest_level, advocacy_candidate flag
update_event_note_text: PATCH updates note_text, verified via GET
event_note_routing: route_single_note: POST sets routed_to_pod=True in MongoDB, creates pod actions
recommendation_crud: create_recommendation: POST creates draft in MongoDB
update_recommendation: PATCH updates fields, verified via GET
recommendation_workflow: send_recommendation: POST transitions draft→sent, persists sent_at and response_history
respond_to_recommendation: POST logs response, transitions to warm_response, persists response_note
follow_up_recommendation: POST increments follow_up_count, sets status=follow_up_needed
close_recommendation: POST sets status=closed, persists closed_at and closed_reason
integration_endpoints: mission_control_returns_data: GET /api/mission-control works with persisted event notes
advocacy_recommendations_list: GET /api/advocacy/recommendations returns grouped recommendations with stats
advocacy_relationships: GET /api/advocacy/relationships computes from persisted data
events_list_returns_data: GET /api/events shows event_0 with 5+ captured notes
data_consistency: create_and_verify_note_persistence: Multiple GET calls return consistent data
create_and_verify_recommendation_persistence: Multiple GET calls return consistent data

page_load: Mission Control page loads with persisted event data in alerts
Events page loads with 6 upcoming, 1 past event (Winter Showcase)
Advocacy page loads with 13 recommendations correctly grouped
Program Intelligence page loads with 25 athletes, 7 events, 13 recommendations
navigation: All 4 mode tabs work (Mission Control, Events, Advocacy, Program)
Events Past tab shows Winter Showcase
Winter Showcase summary shows 5 notes captured from MongoDB
data_display: Winter Showcase summary shows Hot/Warm interest notes: Olivia→Stanford (Hot), Marcus→Michigan (Hot), Lucas→Virginia (Warm), Olivia→Virginia (Warm)
Advocacy page shows seeded recommendations: Marcus Johnson→Michigan (Warm Response), Olivia Anderson→Stanford (Awaiting Reply)
Route to Pod buttons visible on event summary page

verified_persistence_features: MongoDB seed-if-empty: event_notes seeded with 5 mock notes on first run, skips on subsequent runs
MongoDB seed-if-empty: recommendations seeded with 5 mock recs on first run, skips on subsequent runs
POST /api/events/{event_id}/notes: Creates event note in both MongoDB and in-memory
PATCH /api/events/{event_id}/notes/{note_id}: Updates event note in both DB and memory
GET /api/events/{event_id}/notes: Returns notes from MongoDB sorted by captured_at descending
POST /api/events/{event_id}/notes/{note_id}/route: Sets routed_to_pod=True in MongoDB, creates pod actions
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations: Creates recommendation in DB and memory
PATCH /api/advocacy/recommendations/{rec_id}: Updates recommendation fields in DB
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{rec_id}/send: Transitions draft→sent, persists status+response_history to DB
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{rec_id}/respond: Logs response, persists status change + response_history to DB
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{rec_id}/follow-up: Marks follow-up, persists to DB
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations/{rec_id}/close: Closes recommendation, persists to DB
GET /api/mission-control: Returns correct data with persisted event notes feeding decision engine
GET /api/program/intelligence: Returns valid data including advocacy_outcomes from persisted recommendations
GET /api/advocacy/recommendations: Lists all recommendations with correct grouping/stats
GET /api/advocacy/relationships: Computes relationships correctly from persisted data
